scope.summary: C5 repo-janitor cleanup: removes stale tracked C5 artifacts (`npm/oraclemcp`, `.skill-loop-progress.md`, `refactor/`) while keeping prior C5 moves/renames and non-runtime scope out of this commit.
out_of_scope: Earlier C5 move+rename work for tracked plan docs and manifest rewires is already claimed on this bead chain and is not part of this final closure commit.
No runtime behaviour, API surface, or authentication logic was touched in this tracked-content cleanup.
Workspace-wide build/test matrix was not rerun for this close evidence step.

entry_points.name: tracked cleanup verification
entry_points.trace: `git status --short --untracked-files=no` shows neither `npm/oraclemcp` nor `.skill-loop-progress.md` nor `refactor/` tracked in working tree after the committed cleanup.

limitations: The scope only cites tracked-docs-facing paths; code-path deletion proof is encoded by the tracked deletion commit itself and is summarized in the closure scope.
